description_long: This is a compact, rectangular commercial building with a modern glass and metal facade, labeled as the Songpa Smart Library. The front features large sliding glass doors framed in metal, with signage in both Korean and English above the entrance. The side walls are mostly opaque with some window panels, and the roof is flat and metallic gray. The structure appears to be prefabricated, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing functionality and accessibility. The exterior is primarily gray and silver, with some blue accents on the signage. There are no visible displays of electronic products or promotional posters in the windows.
description: A modern, rectangular electronics store with glass doors, metal framing, and prominent bilingual signage. The exterior is sleek and functional, with a flat roof and minimal decoration.
description_view_0: Side view showing a mostly opaque wall with a window and part of the signage visible at the top.
description_view_1: Front view displaying large sliding glass doors, full signage in Korean and English, and some interior visibility through the glass.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a window and partial signage, similar to view 0 but mirrored.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, solid metallic wall with no windows or signage.
attribute_storefront_signage: The storefront features a large, horizontal sign above the entrance with Korean text '송파 스마트 도서관' and English text 'SONGPA SMART LIBRARY' in white, set against a metallic gray background. There is a blue circular logo with a white book icon to the left of the text. The signage is made of metal and plastic, with raised lettering and a clean, modern appearance.

attribute_brand_logos.location: above the entrance on the main sign
attribute_brand_logos.description: Blue circular logo with a white book icon
